name: Telegram Message Reporter
description: Reports a specific Telegram message using a link and custom reason.

STRING_SESSION.description: Telethon String Session (Generate using Bot or PC)

TARGET_LINK.description: Full link of the post (e.g., https://t.me/username/123)

REASON.description: Reason for report (spam, violence, pornography, childabuse, copyright, fake, drugs)
